item.title: Dietary total antioxidant capacity alleviates inflammatory bowel disease-related surgery, gastrointestinal cancer, and mortality risks among middle-aged and older individuals.
item.description: The journal of nutrition, health & aging - This study aimed to investigate the association between dietary total antioxidant capacity (TAC) and the risks of clinical outcomes, including surgery, gastrointestinal cancer, and mortality, among...

item.title: [Advances in clinical management of acute severe ulcerative colitis].
item.description: Zhejiang da xue xue bao. Yi xue ban = Journal of Zhejiang University. Medical sciences - Acute severe ulcerative colitis (ASUC) is a critical emergency in inflam-matory bowel disease. Some patients do not respond to first-line intravenous corticosteroid therapy and require timely salva...

item.title: Risk of avoidant/restrictive food intake disorders in patients with inflammatory bowel disease: a matched cross-sectional case-control study.
item.description: Journal of Crohn's & colitis - Individuals with inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) often modify their diet to manage symptoms; however, these behaviors may evolve into eating disorders, including avoidant/restrictive food intake d...
